content.full_text:
December 21, 2001

Transmitted Via Facsimile & U.S. Mail

C. April Boling, CPA
7185 Navajo Road, Suite L
San Diego, CA 92119

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-053

Dear Ms. Boling:

This correspondence is written confirmation that you have withdrawn your March 6, 2001 request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William L. Williams, Jr.
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

WLW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\01-053

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
